episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #115 — A New Chapter in the Bob Lazar Saga
episodes.summary: Luigi Venditelli joins Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp to discuss S4: The Bob Lazar Story, its reconstruction of the alleged S4 facility, and the continuing debate surrounding Bob Lazar’s claims.
episodes.episodeTitle: A New Chapter in the Bob Lazar Saga

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #92 — The UAP Witness That Didn’t Testify — Congress Wanted You to Hear This
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp interview a military veteran who had been expected to testify before Congress and who reports seeing a large craft hovering above a runway at Eglin Air Force Base before departing at extraordinary speed.
episodes.episodeTitle: The UAP Witness That Didn’t Testify — Congress Wanted You to Hear This

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #91 — Dylan Borland Unloads — The Truth About Legacy UFO Programs: Part 2
episodes.summary: In the second part of the Dylan Borland interview, Borland expands on his allegations concerning legacy UAP programs, compartmented access, intimidation, and the nature of the technology and activity he says he encountered.
episodes.episodeTitle: Dylan Borland Unloads — The Truth About Legacy UFO Programs: Part 2

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #90 — The Reluctant UFO Whistleblower — Dylan Borland Tells All: Part 1
episodes.summary: Dylan Borland recounts his path from the U.S. Air Force into classified contractor work, an alleged firsthand encounter with UAP technology, and claimed threats, clearance manipulation, intimidation, and economic pressure.
episodes.episodeTitle: The Reluctant UFO Whistleblower — Dylan Borland Tells All: Part 1

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #89 — The 2025 UAP Hearing — Did It Move the Needle?
episodes.summary: Participants in the September 2025 congressional UAP hearing discuss preparation, testimony, public reaction, whistleblower risks, and military video showing a missile engagement with an unidentified object over Yemen.
episodes.episodeTitle: The 2025 UAP Hearing — Did It Move the Needle?

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #88 — Injured by UFOs — The Case-by-Case Medical Evidence
episodes.summary: Physicist John Priestland discusses the Unhidden Foundation’s review of physical, physiological, and psychological injuries reported after close encounters and calls for release of AAWSAP records relevant to medical and scientific study.
episodes.episodeTitle: Injured by UFOs — The Case-by-Case Medical Evidence

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #87 — Alien Bodies and Technology — The Lost Tapes of UFO Whistleblower Col. Corso
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp revisit Philip J. Corso’s claims about Roswell materials, Pentagon technology transfer, and reverse engineering through interviews recorded before publication of The Day After Roswell.
episodes.episodeTitle: Alien Bodies and Technology — The Lost Tapes of UFO Whistleblower Col. Corso

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #86 — Threats, Intimidation, Prosecution — The Daunting Risks for UFO Whistleblowers
episodes.summary: Attorney Richard Beckwith and aerospace executive Mike Gold explain the legal, professional, and practical risks facing cleared personnel who consider disclosing sensitive UAP information to Congress, including confusion surrounding promised classified briefings.
episodes.episodeTitle: Threats, Intimidation, Prosecution — The Daunting Risks for UFO Whistleblowers

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #85 — Weaponized Silence — The UFO Disclosure Dilemma
episodes.summary: Joe Murgia, Danny Silva, and Ryan Robbins join the hosts to assess the approaching congressional hearing, witness intimidation, definitions of disclosure, disinformation, and the obstacles facing efforts to obtain undeniable public evidence.
episodes.episodeTitle: Weaponized Silence — The UFO Disclosure Dilemma

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #84 — False Prophets and Flying Objects — The Whistleblower Wave
episodes.summary: The hosts examine preparations for a September congressional UAP hearing, the reluctance of firsthand witnesses to testify, competing pressure from transparency advocates and secrecy interests, and a newly surfaced Defense Department case discussed with Dustin Slaughter.
episodes.episodeTitle: False Prophets and Flying Objects — The Whistleblower Wave

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #83 — Storming the Silence — Dave Foley and the Fight for UAP Transparency
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp interview comedian and actor Dave Foley about his personal UFO sighting, his changing views, and the broader struggle over disinformation, whistleblower suppression, and media treatment of UAP.
episodes.episodeTitle: Storming the Silence — Dave Foley and the Fight for UAP Transparency

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #82 — Disclosure, Drones, and Competition for Crash Materials
episodes.summary: The hosts survey recent UAP disclosure developments, including statements by administration insiders, additional military and intelligence witnesses, congressional interest in secret programs and drones, and reported competition for access to alleged crash materials.
episodes.episodeTitle: Disclosure, Drones, and Competition for Crash Materials

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #81 — The Full Mosul Orb Video
episodes.summary: WEAPONIZED releases the full four-second Mosul Orb video and interviews journalist Dustin Slaughter about obtaining the footage through government-records efforts.
episodes.episodeTitle: The Full Mosul Orb Video

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #80 — UFOs, Nuclear Weapons, and the Wall Street Journal
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp, joined by Robert Hastings and Marik von Rennenkampff, rebut Wall Street Journal reporting about UFO history and examine longstanding reports of UAP activity near nuclear weapons sites.
episodes.episodeTitle: UFOs, Nuclear Weapons, and the Wall Street Journal

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #79 — The Large Disc UAP Video
episodes.summary: The hosts discuss renewed claims that UFO reports stem from government deception and release military-sensor video described as showing a large disc-shaped UAP moving through cloud cover over a conflict zone.
episodes.episodeTitle: The Large Disc UAP Video

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #78 — Sean Kirkpatrick, AARO, and UFO Politics
episodes.summary: The hosts challenge claims attributed to former AARO director Sean Kirkpatrick and discuss UFO politics and Contact in the Desert with Ernie Cline and Dan Cleary.
episodes.episodeTitle: Sean Kirkpatrick, AARO, and UFO Politics

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #77 — UAP Briefings, Immaculate Constellation, and the Jellyfish Debate
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp review closed-door congressional briefings, questions raised by the Matthew Brown interviews, the McMinnville UFO Festival, and AARO commentary concerning the Jellyfish UAP.
episodes.episodeTitle: UAP Briefings, Immaculate Constellation, and the Jellyfish Debate

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #76 — Matthew Brown Part 3: Immaculate Constellation
episodes.summary: In Part 3, Matthew Brown concludes his WEAPONIZED interview with Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp by discussing alleged UAP imagery found on classified systems, the management of public perception, excessive secrecy, congressional inquiry, and his call for additional insiders to come forward.
episodes.episodeTitle: Matthew Brown Part 3: Immaculate Constellation

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #76 — Matthew Brown and Immaculate Constellation — Part 3
episodes.summary: In the conclusion of the interview, Matthew Brown discusses alleged classified UAP imagery, secrecy mechanisms, public perception management, and his appeal for other insiders to come forward.
episodes.episodeTitle: Matthew Brown and Immaculate Constellation — Part 3

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #75 — Matthew Brown Part 2: Immaculate Constellation
episodes.summary: In Part 2, Matthew Brown joins Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp to discuss documents he says he reviewed, the alleged scope and compartmentalization of Immaculate Constellation, and the reporting process he followed before identifying himself publicly.
episodes.episodeTitle: Matthew Brown Part 2: Immaculate Constellation

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #75 — Matthew Brown and Immaculate Constellation — Part 2
episodes.summary: Matthew Brown discusses documents he says he reviewed, the reporting process he followed, and institutional barriers he encountered before publicly identifying himself.
episodes.episodeTitle: Matthew Brown and Immaculate Constellation — Part 2

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #74 — Matthew Brown Part 1: Immaculate Constellation
episodes.summary: Matthew Brown joins Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp for the first part of a discussion concerning his allegations about Immaculate Constellation, compartmentalized UAP programs, whistleblower risk, and congressional oversight.
episodes.episodeTitle: Matthew Brown Part 1: Immaculate Constellation

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #74 — Matthew Brown and Immaculate Constellation — Part 1
episodes.summary: Matthew Brown publicly identifies himself as the author of the Immaculate Constellation report and explains his background, how he encountered the term, and why he chose to come forward.
episodes.episodeTitle: Matthew Brown and Immaculate Constellation — Part 1

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #73 — USS Jackson Eyewitness Alex Wiggins
episodes.summary: Active-duty Navy service member Alex Wiggins describes witnessing a glowing Tic Tac-shaped object emerge from the ocean near USS Jackson and join three similar objects before departing in formation.
episodes.episodeTitle: USS Jackson Eyewitness Alex Wiggins

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #72 — The USS Jackson Tic Tac Video
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp unveil video reportedly recorded aboard USS Jackson in February 2023 after crew members observed multiple Tic Tac-shaped objects, including one said to emerge from the ocean.
episodes.episodeTitle: The USS Jackson Tic Tac Video

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #71 — The Vandenberg Red Square UAP
episodes.summary: Air Force veteran Jeff Nuccetelli describes reported UAP incursions at Vandenberg, including a large glowing red square or rectangular object, and discusses a released military police blotter tied to the event.
episodes.episodeTitle: The Vandenberg Red Square UAP

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #70 — The Age of Disclosure and Media Coverage of UAP
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp discuss The Age of Disclosure, media treatment of UAP witnesses, and omissions they identify in coverage of mystery-drone and 2019 Navy ship incidents.
episodes.episodeTitle: The Age of Disclosure and Media Coverage of UAP

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #69 — John Mack, Ariel School, and Reporting the Unreportable
episodes.summary: In the second part of the Ralph Blumenthal interview, the discussion focuses on John Mack’s abduction research, Harvard’s review of his work, the Ariel School encounter, and barriers facing modern UAP whistleblowers.
episodes.episodeTitle: John Mack, Ariel School, and Reporting the Unreportable

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #68 — Ralph Blumenthal and the 2017 New York Times UFO Story
episodes.summary: Ralph Blumenthal describes how he, Helene Cooper, and Leslie Kean reported the landmark 2017 New York Times UFO story, the editorial resistance they encountered, and his research into psychiatrist John Mack.
episodes.episodeTitle: Ralph Blumenthal and the 2017 New York Times UFO Story

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #67 — Richard Dolan’s History of USOs
episodes.summary: Historian Richard Dolan discusses documented reports of unidentified submerged objects, alleged transmedium craft, maritime witnesses, and cases presented in A History of USOs, Volume 1.
episodes.episodeTitle: Richard Dolan’s History of USOs

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #66 — Mike Gold on NASA, UAP, and Space Research
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp speak with space executive and NASA adviser Mike Gold about NASA archives, advanced-material research in zero gravity, historical UAP data, and public-private cooperation.
episodes.episodeTitle: Mike Gold on NASA, UAP, and Space Research

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #65 — UFO Revolution Premiere Q&A
episodes.summary: At the Ojai Playhouse premiere of UFO Revolution, Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp discuss the documentary’s account of UAP transparency efforts, whistleblowers, Congress, and disputed handling of the Immaculate Constellation report.
episodes.episodeTitle: UFO Revolution Premiere Q&A

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #64 — The 2024 UAP Year in Review
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp join citizen journalists Joe Murgia, Ryan Robbins, and Danny Silva to review major UAP developments, controversies, disappointments, and expectations for 2025.
episodes.episodeTitle: The 2024 UAP Year in Review

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #63 — Mystery Drones and Australia’s Saucer Nests
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp examine unresolved mystery-drone incursions in New Jersey and near UK military bases, then speak with Australian journalists Danielle O’Neal and Piia Wirsu about their investigation of Queensland “saucer nests” and UFO history.
episodes.episodeTitle: Mystery Drones and Australia’s Saucer Nests

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #62 — Sky Intruders, Drones, and a Transmedium UFO Video
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp speak with Chris Sharp about recurring incursions near UK military facilities and with underwater archaeologist Rory Kremer about video of an object appearing to descend into the Pacific Ocean, while also reviewing the November 2024 congressional UAP hearing.
episodes.episodeTitle: Sky Intruders, Drones, and a Transmedium UFO Video

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #61 — The Tic Tac at Twenty
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp mark the twentieth anniversary of the 2004 Nimitz Tic Tac encounter with David Fravor, reviewing the carrier group’s sensor detections, Fravor’s visual encounter, and the case’s role in renewed government and public attention to UAP.
episodes.episodeTitle: The Tic Tac at Twenty

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #60 — WEAPONIZED Series Overview
episodes.summary: The official Episode #60 page contains a general description of the WEAPONIZED investigative series rather than a topic-specific episode synopsis. This record preserves the publication date and official source without inventing guests, cases, or claims.
episodes.episodeTitle: WEAPONIZED Series Overview

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #59 — Journalists vs. Secrecy
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp speak with journalists Chris Sharp and Matt Laslo about professional attacks on UAP reporters, Sharp’s reporting on an alleged multi-agency ocean operation, and the status of disclosure legislation and future hearings.
episodes.episodeTitle: Journalists vs. Secrecy

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #58 — UFO Transparency in the Corridors of Power
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp discuss the collapse of proposed 2024 UAP disclosure amendments, plans for additional congressional hearings, and Lester Nare’s Capitol Hill advocacy for continued UAP transparency.
episodes.episodeTitle: UFO Transparency in the Corridors of Power

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #57 — The Colares UFO Attacks and Brazilian Military Files
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp speak with Brazilian investigator Thiago Ticchetti about the Colares UFO incidents, the Brazilian Air Force investigation, alleged injuries, and claims that high-quality military imagery was transferred to the United States.
episodes.episodeTitle: The Colares UFO Attacks and Brazilian Military Files

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #56 — Las Vegas Update, Dave Navarro, and Crop Circle History
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell reconnects with George Knapp in Las Vegas, discusses projects underway behind the scenes, notes musician Dave Navarro’s return to the stage and UFO interest, and revisits a 1994 UK crop-circle investigation.
episodes.episodeTitle: Las Vegas Update, Dave Navarro, and Crop Circle History

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #55 — AARO, Congressional Oversight, and the Kirkpatrick Interview
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp mark the first anniversary of the July 2023 House UAP hearing and speak with Marik von Rennenkampff about his interview with former AARO director Sean Kirkpatrick, congressional disclosure efforts, and disputed assessments of major UAP cases.
episodes.episodeTitle: AARO, Congressional Oversight, and the Kirkpatrick Interview

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #54 — Pantex, Nuclear-Site UAP Incursions, and FOIA Records
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp examine reported UAP incursions around nuclear facilities and are joined by Dustin Slaughter to discuss redacted records concerning a 2015 diamond-shaped craft near the Pantex plant.
episodes.episodeTitle: Pantex, Nuclear-Site UAP Incursions, and FOIA Records

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #53 — Kona Blue, AARO, and Continuing UAP Incursions
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp review the proposed Kona Blue program, dispute public characterizations of whistleblower testimony, and discuss continuing drone and UAP incursions over sensitive U.S. military airspace.
episodes.episodeTitle: Kona Blue, AARO, and Continuing UAP Incursions

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #52 — Season Finale and AARO Historical Report Review
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp review major moments from the first season, revisit interviews with government investigators, journalists, and disclosure advocates, and criticize AARO’s newly released historical report on U.S. government UFO investigations.
episodes.episodeTitle: Season Finale and AARO Historical Report Review

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #51 — Unreleased Episode Placeholder
episodes.summary: The official WEAPONIZED catalog reserves Episode #51 but does not publish episode content, stating only that some episodes are worth the wait.
episodes.episodeTitle: Unreleased Episode Placeholder

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #50 — Washington Update on UAP Transparency and Congressional Oversight
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp report from Washington, D.C. on the status of congressional UAP oversight, possible future hearings, and concerns shared in meetings with lawmakers, staff, and firsthand witnesses.
episodes.episodeTitle: Washington Update on UAP Transparency and Congressional Oversight

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #49 — Pushback, AARO, and the UFO Information War
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp examine institutional and media pushback against UAP disclosure efforts, discuss former AARO director Sean Kirkpatrick, and include a segment featuring Bob Lazar.
episodes.episodeTitle: Pushback, AARO, and the UFO Information War

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #48 — Ernest Cline, UFO History, and Science-Fiction Culture
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp visit author and screenwriter Ernest Cline to discuss his career, UFO research interests, science-fiction influences, and extensive collection of pop-culture and UFO materials.
episodes.episodeTitle: Ernest Cline, UFO History, and Science-Fiction Culture

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #47 — The Jellyfish UAP Investigation
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp explain how they obtained and evaluated thermal video of the alleged Jellyfish UAP recorded at a U.S. military base in Iraq, discuss reported transmedium behavior, and respond to proposed conventional explanations.
episodes.episodeTitle: The Jellyfish UAP Investigation

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #46 — Richard Dolan on Disclosure, History, and USO Cases
episodes.summary: Historian Richard Dolan joins Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp for a wide-ranging discussion of disclosure, intelligence and defense institutions, whistleblower revelations, congressional statements, academic interest, global UFO history, and unidentified submerged object cases.
episodes.episodeTitle: Richard Dolan on Disclosure, History, and USO Cases

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #45 — John Alexander on Crash Retrievals, NIDS, and the Sol Conference
episodes.summary: John B. Alexander joins Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp to discuss the Advanced Theoretical Physics program, alleged crash-retrieval programs, NIDS, Skinwalker Ranch, the Sol Foundation conference, and Philip J. Corso.
episodes.episodeTitle: John Alexander on Crash Retrievals, NIDS, and the Sol Conference

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #44 — The Fight Over the UAP Disclosure Act
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp examine the weakening of proposed UAP disclosure legislation and speak with Liberation Times editor and publisher Chris Sharp about congressional opposition and defense-contractor influence.
episodes.episodeTitle: The Fight Over the UAP Disclosure Act

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #43 — The Unreleased Philip Corso Tapes
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp revisit Philip J. Corso’s Roswell technology-transfer claims and examine previously unreleased interviews recorded by personnel associated with the National Institute for Discovery Science.
episodes.episodeTitle: The Unreleased Philip Corso Tapes

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #42 — The Sol Foundation Conference and Grusch Revelations
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp are joined by citizen journalist Joe Murgia to discuss the inaugural Sol Foundation symposium, David Grusch’s recent public comments, congressional pressure surrounding the UAP Disclosure Act, and the Syria “Dome” UAP photograph.
episodes.episodeTitle: The Sol Foundation Conference and Grusch Revelations

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #28 — Congressional Hearing Roundtable
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp are joined by Ross Coulthart and Bryce Zabel for a roundtable about the July 26, 2023 House UAP hearing, its three witnesses, how the hearing came together, and what might follow.
episodes.episodeTitle: Congressional Hearing Roundtable

episodes.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #21 — The David Grusch Revelations
episodes.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp recount their early contact with David Grusch, his decision to come forward publicly, his whistleblower complaint, and reported retaliation connected to his UAP disclosures.
episodes.episodeTitle: The David Grusch Revelations
